function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Attached is the requested invoice from 2026-02-08 for Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH (INV-0004).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email record has been written once as required; now finalize inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox item that was already read.
next_step.observation: The outbound email write completed for 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, verified sender and invoice canonically, created outbound draft with attachment, and removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by validating the sender identity (Nina), locating the requested 2026-02-08 Nordstern invoice (INV-0004), creating an outbound draft email with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md, and deleting the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read root AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, used process-next-inbox-item and processing-inbox-email workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email in cast record, used sending-email workflow for outbox file format, and deleted inbox item after full completion per inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical evidence supports full completion: inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, sender match confirmed by 10_entities/cast/nina.md primary_contact_email, requested invoice confirmed by 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md, outbound draft recorded in 60_outbox/outbox with exact attachment path, then inbox item removed as required by 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and process-next-inbox-item.md.
